name: neon-nexus-bullet-time-brickbreaker
description: Neon Nexus: Bullet-Time Brick Breaker — a visually-stunning, cross-platform neon brick breaker built on Phaser 4.
author: Tuhin Karmakar

scripts.cap:android: pnpm run build && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: pnpm run build && cap sync ios && cap open ios
scripts.cap:add:android: pnpm run build && cap add android && cap sync android
